task_updates.executor_notes: Focused tests run via inline Python verification (no new test file created per constraints). Results: (1) Tool binding drift: 9 specs → 9 bindings, all callable, all names match. (2) ToolResult envelope: ok/error/truncated/truncation_note all round-trip via to_dict(). (3) understand_image/video return ToolResult(ok=False) gracefully without Gemini key; empty URL returns error. (4) validate_media_batch: 7 scenarios (empty, missing url, invalid URL, unsupported type, platform limit exceeded, valid URLs) all correct. (5) _truncate_description: 4 scenarios (short, medium-long flagged, very long actually truncated, empty) all correct. (6) Regression suite: 99/99 live_update_social + social_publish tests pass. (7) Full project suite: 315 passed, 19 skipped, 7 pre-existing failures confirmed unrelated. All T7 acceptance criteria satisfied.
